raw_consumer_statement:
This is what I am sending to Best Buy Subject : Urgent Issue with XXXX XXXX XXXX Missing Item and Order Cancellation Dear Best Buy Customer Support, I am writing to report a serious issue regarding my recent order placed online with Best Buy. 

Order Details : Product : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Order Number : XXXX Order Date : XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX The package was delivered today. Upon receipt, I noticed that the original shipping box had been tampered withthe official Best Buy seal was broken and replaced with clear tape. When I opened the package, I found the original XXXX packaging inside, but it was also opened and the XXXX XXXX itself was missing. 

I immediately contacted Best Buy Customer Service to report the issue. The representative I spoke with offered three options : a refund, a reshipment, or an in-store pickup replacement. Because this XXXX XXXX is a XXXX  gift for my son, and I did not want to risk another shipping issue, I chose the in-store pickup option. 

However, I encountered issues during this process : The store pickup was set under my name, but I am currently out of town in XXXX  for work and normally reside in XXXX. 

I attempted to change the pickup person to my wife, but the system would not allow me to do so. 

It did allow me to change the pickup location, so I updated it to a local store in XXXX  where I am currently staying. 

The system confirmed the change and stated the item would be ready for pickup later today. 

When I checked my Best Buy account XXXX minutes later, I was surprised to find that the replacement order had been canceled. I called customer service again, explained the situation, and was told that the system had flagged and canceled the order, though no specific reason could be provided. 

The agent assured me that he would remove the flag and submit a refund request, and that I should hear back within XXXX hours. 

However, at XXXX XXXX  this evening, I received an email from Best Buy stating that the order was canceled and that a refund could not be processed. The email instructed me to work with local law enforcement. 

This is extremely frustrating and concerning. I have been proactive and transparent throughout this process and would simply like to receive the product I purchasedor at the very least, a proper refund. 

Please advise on the next steps. I am hopeful this issue can be resolved quickly and amicably without requiring further escalation. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
